UIWindowManager.id31:
1. Ace Showdown provides a cross-server contest among all players in all servers in the season

2. Each complete season of Ace Showdown lasts for 30 days. It is divided by 3 stages: Challenge Peak, Ace Contest, Peak of Honor
UIWindowManager.id33:
The peak battle is divided into six sections: bronze, silver, gold, platinum, diamond, king

2). Bronze, silver, gold, platinum, and diamond have three sub sections, each of which is promoted from I to III

3). The first time you enter the peak battle, you need to set up the defensive array capacity first, and the system will allocate the initial stage for the player according to the total combat effectiveness of the defensive lineup Section protection

4). Bronze rank will not be deducted if the battle fails, and silver I will not lose the rank if the battle fails

5). In the new season, rank inheritance rules are as follows: 
 king → diamond I
    diamond III → diamond I
    diamond II → platinum III
    diamond I → platinum II
    platinum III → platinum II
    platinum II → platinum I
    platinum I → gold III
    gold III → gold II
    gold II → gold I
    gold I → silver III
    Sections under silver III will be inherited directly
UIWindowManager.id35:
1). The first to the 25th day of every complete season is the Challenge Peak stage

2). During the Challenge Peak period, the player can match with players of other servers to fight. When they have insufficient combat attempts, they may spend gems to purchase more

3). If you're not satisfied with the opponent you matched with, you can spend gems to rematch

4). Each team needs to deploy 1 hero at least. Or this team will be considered as losing automatically

5). When the battle times out, the defending team will win

6). The team that wins the most in a battle will obtain the final victory
UIWindowManager.id37:
1). The 26th day to the 29th day of every complete season is the Ace Contest stage

2). After Challenge Peak ends, the 64 players in the Ace Peak Leaderboard will be randomly matched together to perform Ace Contest

3). During the Ace Contest period, the player's lineup will be the defend lineup upon the end of the Challenge Peak

4). The battle of the Ace Contest will be matched by the system automatically. Each player team will join in the battle in an order accordingly until one side has no more team available, which will be considered as being defeated

5). During Ace Contest period, all players can watch the day's battle log and bet with gems. There is a chance to gain double gem rewards
UIWindowManager.id39:
1). The 30th day of every complete season is the Peak of Honor

2). The top 8 players of the Peak of Honor of every district will be added to Hall of Honor to be displayed permanently
UIWindowManager.id41:
1). Rank Rewards: During the season period, you can claim them directly after reaching the related rank

2). Settlement Rewards: After the season ends, it will be issued via mails. Only the player who has at least taken part in once during the season will receive the settlement rewards

3). Ace Contest Rewards: It will be issued via mails after the season ends

HeroLinkSetting.id1:
1. The left side of the resonance slot can be placed in with SS or SSS Hero at Lv. 1 or higher as primary hero

2. After placing Primary Hero, the right side can be placed in a hero of different quality (SS and SSS) at Lv. 1 as resonance hero. There shouldn't be another hero with the identical name (Except for the heroes who are already deployed in Cell Game)

3. The level, Kiko Stats percentage, Limit Breakthrough level, gear, stone, weapon, earrings, and marks will always be the same as the primary hero. And you cannot perform actions like upgrade breakthrough, equipping gear, stone, weapon, and marks

4. The star level, affinity, Spirit, Skin, Clan Technology, and Team Training bonus will always remain as the original state and allows you to perform awakening, affinity activation, spirit change, and skin actions

5. Removing the primary hero will restore the status of the resonance hero

6. Removing resonance hero will restore the stats of the resonance hero that are identical to the primary hero to be completely reset. The related resonance slot will enter CD time. You can spend gems to refresh the CD time immediately

7. The heroes who have resonance with each other cannot be deployed in the same battle

8. Resonance Hero cannot be used as the required hero during a hero's limit breakthrough
HeroLinkSetting.id3:
1. After 15 heroes reach the max star, the resonance system will upgrade, unlocking the team's total quality

2. When reaching a specific total quality of the team, it can break through the hero's max level limit

3. After the team's total quality reaches 12170, the hero's level cap will be unlocked to Lv. 340

4. After the whole team's total quality reaches 13262, the hero's level cap is unlocked to Lv. 360

5. The hero's level cap is kept to be the highest in the history
